# /task

> Detail the L4 task cards seeded by `/plan`. One markdown file per L4 task at `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/tasks/{object-id}.task.md`. Filename uses the object-id prefix (e.g., `EXT-12.task.md`).

## Usage

```
/task [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--task <object-id>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/plan.md` (`PLAN_CLARIFIED` APPROVED)
- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/tdd.md`
- [templates/task.template.md](../../templates/task.template.md)
- [constitution/04-extension-coding-standards.md](../../constitution/04-extension-coding-standards.md) (naming, CoC patterns)

## Execution flow

1. Enumerate L4 placeholders from plan.md.
2. For each L4:
   - Validate object-id prefix (EXT/BDC/OPR/INT/DEN/SEC/WFL)
   - Map to TDD §5 object detail row
   - Author task card with:
     - Title: `[{prefix}] {object name} — {action}` (e.g., `[EXT-12] SalesPostingHandler CoC method run`)
     - Estimate (3-8h)
     - Inputs / outputs / ACs
     - Unit-test policy (X++ unit-test class location per [constitution/05-development-and-alm.md § Testing](../../constitution/05-development-and-alm.md))
     - Dependencies (upstream task object-ids; deployable-package ordering)
3. `currentStates += TASK_DRAFT`; `gates.TASK_VALIDATED.status=PENDING`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/tasks/{object-id}.task.md` (one per L4)
